document.source_title: CSK qualification scenario: How can CSK reach IPL 2026 Playoffs after LSG defeat?

claims.claim_text: CSK can still qualify for the IPL 2026 Playoffs if they win their remaining matches.
claims.evidence_text: If CSK can win both of their remaining games, they will finish on 16 points wherein the Net Run Rate could come into the play to decide their finish in the standings.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings fought back hard to keep their IPL 2026 Playoffs hopes alive.

entities.name: Lucknow Super Giants
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India.
entities.evidence_text: CSK were dealt a blow when they lost to Lucknow Super Giants by seven wickets.

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India.
entities.evidence_text: CSK are slated to take on the Gujarat Titans in their remaining matches.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India.
entities.evidence_text: CSK are slated to take on the Sunrisers Hyderabad in their remaining matches.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Mohali, Punjab, India.
entities.evidence_text: CSK would have become the fourth team to reach 14 points had they beaten LSG, even pipping the Punjab Kings.

entities.name: Rajasthan Royals
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India.
entities.evidence_text: CSK are all but out of the Playoffs race as both PBKS and Rajasthan Royals can breach the 14-point mark.

events.evidence_text: On Friday at the Ekana Stadium in Lucknow, CSK had the chance to take a crucial step ahead towards the Playoffs.

metrics.name: points
metrics.evidence_text: If CSK can win both of their remaining games, they will finish on 16 points.
